sys_script_include.description:
Taking a User, find the default OU for the user. This is used anywhere the system is trying to set the default OU. Putting it in a script include will make a switch from finding the highest OU for a member to finding the "Default OU" for a member if we choose to make that switch. 2.8.1 | 2023-03-17 | RAJ | STRY0137140 - Master Story for "Task Manager Dashboard"- All Performance Improvement and Clean up Changes NOTE: this fix was in 2.8 hotfix worked with Brian Thomas 2.8.1 | 2022-11-23 | RAJ | STRY0132318 - Tasker User Profile- New Component- "Out of Office Schedule" - Profile Card View 2.8.1 | 2022-10-24 - raj - STRY0131148 - Add New Table for Tasker User in preparation for Out of Office - this script really only changes the Org User to match the Org Member 2.8 | 2022-01-28 | raj | STRY0116823 - Org Hierarchy Tree- Bifold Widget and Fullscreen view- Add Picture-in-picture feature
2.7.1 | 2021-12-19 | raj | DFCT0010769 - Error Message in Log: "x_153465_discovert_discover_office_hierarchy : The undefined value has no properties."
2.7 |raj | STRY0104389 - There is an error in the DIA log related to the function - GetUserDefaultOU - org.mozilla.javascript.EcmaError: The undefined value has no properties. 2.7 |raj | STRY0059849 - OU Roles - OU Hierarchy Administrator
sys_script_include.name: OrganizationalScripts
